mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, supplier_id, address_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, receiver_address, delivery_method, appointment_date, appointment_time, product_amount, delivery_fee, installation_fee, discount_amount, pay_amount, pay_status, order_status, delivery_status, installation_status, remark, paid_at, received_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_orders (order_no, user_id, supplier_id, address_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, receiver_address, delivery_method, appointment_date, appointment_time, product_amount, delivery_fee, installation_fee, discount_amount, pay_amount, pay_status, order_status, delivery_status, installation_status, remark, paid_at, received_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{addressId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{receiverName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiverMobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiverAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appointmentDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{appointmentTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deliveryFee, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{installationFee, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{discountAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{payAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{payStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{installationStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paidAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{receivedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{completedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO client_orders (order_no, user_id, supplier_id, address_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, receiver_address, delivery_method, appointment_date, appointment_time, product_amount, delivery_fee, installation_fee, discount_amount, pay_amount, pay_status, order_status, delivery_status, installation_status, remark, paid_at, received_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.addressId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.receiverName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.receiverMobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.receiverAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.deliveryMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.appointmentDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.appointmentTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.deliveryFee, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.installationFee, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.discountAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.payAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.payStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.deliveryStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.installationStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.paidAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.receivedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.completedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM client_orders WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT FROM client_orders WHERE order_no = #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM client_orders WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
DELETE FROM client_orders WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
